comments.phase5_issues: Batch size for creating Holdings from Issues. Set to 999 to process all issues at once (typical cases have <10 issues).
comments.phase6_holdings: Batch size for creating Ruling and Arguments from Holdings. Set to 999 to process all holdings at once (typical cases have <10 holdings). Single call returns both Ruling and Arguments per holding.
comments.phase9_arguments: Batch size for extracting Facts from Arguments. Set to 999 to process all arguments at once (typical cases have <30 arguments). Lower if you see quality issues with large argument sets.
comments.phase10_facts: Batch size for extracting Witnesses/Evidence from Facts. Recommended: 8-12. Higher values save cost but may reduce de-dup accuracy as catalogs grow larger. Context per call: ~10k case text + batch facts + catalogs ≈ 15-25k tokens.

model_overrides.comment: Optional: override models for specific phases (e.g., 'gemini-2.0-flash-exp'). Null uses crew default.
